visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of a woman with long, dark brown hair. Her expression is one of intense concentration and concern, with wide eyes and a slightly parted mouth. The background is softly blurred, suggesting an indoor setting with muted, neutral colors. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on her emotional reaction. A woman speaks in a low, slightly strained voice, her words delivered slowly and deliberately. Her tone is one of focused concentration and perhaps a hint of nervousness as she seems to be carefully explaining or recalling a specific, technical detail. "Start up... uh, muscle stamp at the top." The audio is quiet, with no background music or other distracting sounds, placing all the emphasis on her hushed and serious voice.
